last_result.message: This rewind leaves the current call obligation scope. Confirm it only if that broader recovery boundary is the state you want to restore.

checkpoint.label: Rewind to before committed tactic #2
checkpoint.repair_use_when: Use this only when the chosen procedure-level route was wrong, not for a local invariant or branch-surgery problem.
checkpoint.after_rewind_next: Re-enter the procedure with a different high-level route or inspect `goal_info` first.
checkpoint.effect_if_selected: This confirms a rewind that leaves the current call obligation scope and returns the refreshed view.

options.label: Show current rewind choices
options.effect_if_selected: This returns to the checkpoint menu without changing the proof state.

options.label: Continue current branch
options.effect_if_selected: This keeps working from the current proof state.
